title: Implement URL Shortener REST API in Go

steps.description: Implement core logic for URL shortening and retrieval, including value objects and entities for the domain layer.
steps.done_condition: Core domain logic implemented and unit tested.

steps.description: Define ports for URL shortener operations (e.g., create and retrieve URL), establishing interfaces for interaction with domain logic.
steps.done_condition: Ports implemented and ready for use.

steps.description: Implement in-memory storage solution for managing shortened URLs in the secondary adapter.
steps.done_condition: In-memory storage implemented and integration tested.

steps.description: Create REST API endpoints in the primary adapter for handling requests related to URL shortening.
steps.done_condition: REST API endpoints created and passing integration tests.

mergeOrder: Merge domain and ports before secondary and primary adapters
successCriteria: API for URL shortening works as intended with in-memory storage.
All components are tested and validated against requirements.
